creator: kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
Updated the port asfiles-1.0(x11-fm/asfiles). 

Current modifications are :

(1) Add resource file Files so as to install ${PREFIX}/lib/X11/app-defaults/Files
(2) PREFIX varialization has been done!

Update files are respecively :
